{"id":"smallhold-2h7","title":"Inbound Update{Actor}: re-fetch and update remote_accounts cache","description":"Handle Update{Person/Service/Application}: re-fetch the actor document, parse, update remote_accounts row with new display_name, bio_html, avatar_url, header_url, public_key_pem, and last_fetched_at. Do not update actor_uri or username — those are immutable.

**Agent workflow**: Spawn a research subagent to capture Update{Person} fixtures from mastodon.social and document the structure.

**Test discipline**:
- Update with new display_name: remote_accounts.display_name updated
- Update with new public_key_pem: old key replaced (important for key rotation)
- Update with malformed actor document: reject, keep old data
- Verify ammonia sanitizes new bio_html
All fixtures captured from real servers. Never use implementation as its own oracle. Real in-memory SQLite for DB tests.

**Defensive programming**:
- Always re-fetch the full actor document rather than trusting the embedded object in the Update activity
- Verify Update is signed by the same actor
- Do not update immutable fields (actor_uri, username, domain, public_key_id)
- No .unwrap() outside test code; all errors Result<T, AppError>","acceptance_criteria":"Profile fields updated; key rotation handled by replacing public_key_pem; malformed update rejected with old data preserved; immutable fields unchanged; bio_html sanitized by ammonia","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:30:01Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:30:01Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-p99","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:30:11Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
